semantic_text:
Aberto and Cistern Aperio

- aberto charm to open doors
- citern aperio charm to eject container block contents
- fixed a bug in colloportus logic to determine if target is a door
- added common isDoor and isChest block functions
- fixed bug in aliquam floo reloading from saved file on server start, world does not exist yet so we cannot get the fire type. Moved the check to floo activate function so now it gets called every time but it works so yay
- made it so that colloportus confirms the door is closed since the player can sometimes bump it open if they are too close when casting

https://github.com/Azami7/Ollivanders2/issues/11
https://github.com/Azami7/Ollivanders2/pull/537

snail to teapot

- added ranaculus amphoram which turns a tadpole in to a decorated pot

https://github.com/Azami7/Ollivanders2/issues/546

Switching Spell

- added switching spell permurate
- fixed minor spell termination bug in TransfigurationBase
- code reformat

https://github.com/Azami7/Ollivanders2/issues/542
Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/542-permurate' into 542-permurate

Verdimillious and Vermillious (#541)

* Verdimillious and Vermillious

- redid verdimillious and verdimillious duo to align with books
- added verdimillious tria
- created new pyro prasina and mega pyro prasina spells to make green fireworks
- added vermillious spell family
- added cursed flag to item enchantments so verdmillious can detect curses
- warnings cleanup
- code reformat

https://github.com/Azami7/Ollivanders2/issues/540

Verdimillious and Vermillious (#541)

* Verdimillious and Vermillious

- redid verdimillious and verdimillious duo to align with books
- added verdimillious tria
- created new pyro prasina and mega pyro prasina spells to make green fireworks
- added vermillious spell family
- added cursed flag to item enchantments so verdmillious can detect curses
- warnings cleanup
- code reformat

https://github.com/Azami7/Ollivanders2/issues/540

Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/spell-canon' into spell-canon

Beetle to Button (#545)

- added Scarabaeus Fibulumn which turns and endermite, the closest thing to a beetle in MC, in to a button
- added LivingEntityToItemTransfiguration abstract class to support additional entity -> item spells
- removed loading message for all spells now that there are > 160 of them, too spammy
- removed leftover aliquam floo debug message not needed
- code reformatting
- fixed warnings
- added ranaculus amphoram which turns a tadpole in to a decorated pot

https://github.com/Azami7/Ollivanders2/issues/544
https://github.com/Azami7/Ollivanders2/issues/546

ranunculus amphoram - tadpole to teapot
Add vermillious (red sparks) and rework verdimillious to match the books. Remove periculum since this was only one of the movies and a game and is the same spell as vermillious
